metadata.title: Bizarre Lineage Wiki - Codes, Tier List, Beginner Guide
metadata.description: Bizarre Lineage Wiki is a focused guide hub for Roblox players looking for verified codes, practical tier list decisions, starter progression, and stand pages.
metadata.keywords: bizarre lineage wiki, bizarre lineage codes, bizarre lineage tier list, bizarre lineage beginner guide

hero.title: Bizarre Lineage Wiki for fast answers and cleaner decisions
hero.description: A focused, English-only guide hub for Bizarre Lineage players who want current codes, a readable tier list, an actual beginner route, and stand pages that get to the point.

announcement.title: Five high-priority pages first. Scale later.

hero.tip: Not affiliated with Roblox or the game developers.

image_invert.alt: Bizarre Lineage Wiki homepage preview dark

introduce.title: Start from the four search intents that matter most
introduce.label: Core Pages
introduce.description: The MVP does not try to cover every system in the game. It focuses on the pages players search for first and the templates worth expanding later.

items.title: Codes
items.description: Check verified rewards, redemption steps, and expired codes without digging through filler.

items.title: Tier List
items.description: See the current judgment criteria first, then scan the tier breakdown and sample stand links.

items.title: Beginner Guide
items.description: Use a short first-session route instead of learning through trial and error.

items.title: Stand Sample Page
items.description: Open Star Platinum to preview the database-style page format we can scale later.

benefits.title: Why this wiki is intentionally small right now
benefits.label: Why Trust This Wiki
benefits.description: The site favors decision speed, clear page structure, and verification-first notes over mass-produced filler pages.

items.title: Search intent first
items.description: Every MVP page maps to a real player need: codes, ranking decisions, first-hour progression, or a stand lookup.

items.title: Verification-first updates
items.description: Pages are written to surface what is checked, what is provisional, and what still needs in-game confirmation.

items.title: Templates built to scale
items.description: If these five pages earn impressions and clicks, the same format can extend to more stands, items, and guides.

features.title: Recently verified structure
features.description: The homepage acts as a navigation hub and highlights what each page is designed to answer quickly.

items.title: Open `/codes` for reward checks
items.description: See active and expired code handling, plus redemption troubleshooting.

items.title: Open `/tier-list` for ranking context
items.description: Read the evaluation dimensions before trusting any tier placement.

items.title: Open `/guides/beginner-guide` for the first session route
items.description: Use a checklist-led path instead of long-form filler.

items.title: Open `/stands/star-platinum` for a sample database page
items.description: Judge whether the stand is worth your time before grinding for it.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Short answers to the most important site-level questions.

items.question: Is this an official Bizarre Lineage wiki?
items.answer: No. This is an independent community guide site and it is not affiliated with Roblox or the game developers.

items.question: Why are there only a few pages right now?
items.answer: The MVP focuses on a small set of high-intent pages so the content quality, layout, and SEO performance can be validated before expanding.

items.question: What should I read first as a new player?
items.answer: Start with the Beginner Guide, then check the Tier List and the Star Platinum page if you are comparing early goals.

cta.title: Start with the page that matches your problem
cta.description: Need rewards now, meta context, or a first-session route? The MVP is built to get you there in one click.
